div1.entryFree:
Mare, 1) the female of the horse: Ven. 384. H5 II, 1, 26. H4B II, 1, 84. Ant. III, 7, 8. Ant. III, 7, 8 to ride the wild m. == to play at see-saw, H4B II, 4, 268. Proverbial phrases: the man shall have his m. again == all shall be right again, Mids. III, 2, 463. whose m. is dead? == what is the matter? what is amiss? H4B II, 1, 46.
2) the night-mare, incubus: I will ride thee o'nights like the m. H4B II, 1, 83.
